@media print{body *{visibility:hidden;background:transparent!important;box-shadow:none!important}#invoice-print-frame,#invoice-print-frame *,#general-print-preview-content,#general-print-preview-content *{visibility:visible}#invoice-print-frame,#general-print-preview-content{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:100%;padding:0!important;margin:0!important;box-shadow:none!important;border:none!important}.no-print{display:none!important}}
